ops.title: Plugin pack changes must ride a plugin.json version bump
ops.body:
capt-hook v12.0.0 (2026-07-20) deleted `BaseHookEvent.command_line` in favor of the always-present `evt.cmd` (`.line`/`.raw`). The pack was migrated the same day (3a084c59), but `plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` stayed at 0.13.0 — and marketplace installs cache the pack per version, so every machine kept running the stale 0.13.0 hooks and crashed with `AttributeError: no attribute 'command_line'` on nearly every PostToolUse event (426 crashes in one transcript).

Fix (150b254c): bumped the pack to 0.14.0 and raised the capt-hook floor to >=12 at all three sites — the `plugin.json` dependency, the CI `pack test` uvx spec (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`), and the PEP 723 header of `plugin/capt-hook/hooks/tests/test_cc_notes.py`.

**Rule:** any content change under `plugin/` ships with a `plugin.json` version bump in the same change — installed caches refresh only when the version changes. Precedent: capt-hook dependency-floor raises take a minor bump (0.12.0→0.13.0 rode >=10→>=11). After a bump lands, heal a machine with `claude plugin update cc-notes@cc-notes` and restart live sessions (hooks load at session start).
